item.title: Development Guide
item.description: Development Guide This guide covers development workflows and tooling for the Launcher project. Quick Start # Get help with all available commands make help # Quick development cycle make check Prerequisites mise — tool version manager Go 1.26.2 (managed by mise) golangci-lint 2.10.1 (managed by mise) # Install mise, then: mise install Contributing Workflow The main branch is protected — all changes must go through pull requests.
